Off Calendar May-29-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Case settled. Defendant to vacate by 5:00 PM today and receive $400; or having failed to move, Judgment against him in the amount of $980 plus immediate possession will be executed. Commissioner, Loretta Norris; Clerk, D. Feinberg Reporter, Joyce Long. Trial Date is vacated.
